data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for engagement scoring.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the engagement scoring for follow-up segmentation, but there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for engagement scoring, the prior evidence does not include any data or endpoints that demonstrate how engagement scoring is implemented or measured. Therefore, the validation cannot be completed due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of engagement scoring mechanisms for follow-up segmentation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify engagement scoring functionality.
